subcodes.first_line: ...Thou hast given the utmost praise to the two believers, German and Austrian. Go to Stuttgart and see with thine own eyes what is there!
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسیار ستایش از دو دوست آلمانی و اطریشی نموده بودی بیا برو به استتگارت ببین چه خبر است
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @naming of children; of individuals, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement
